item.title: CSS Properties Hierarchy (Or: How I Learned Custom Properties Can Replace Preprocessors)
item.description: :root { --border-radius: 5px; } .element { /* css custom properties */ --var--example: 1; ​ /* position */ position: absolute; inset: 0; /* top, right, bottom, left */ z-index: 1;

item.title: Template Engine and Template Structure (Or: Why I Didn't Use Handlebars Like a Normal Person)
